title: Biome lint/format + lefthook pre-commit
acceptance_criteria: biome.json configures Biome as both formatter and linter: formatter enabled (indentStyle: space, indentWidth: 2, lineWidth: 100); linter enabled with recommended rules; organizeImports enabled

biome.json adds a custom lint rule to ban Date.now() and new Date() calls outside src/utils/clock.ts — use noRestrictedGlobals or equivalent Biome rule; if Biome does not support this natively, add a comment explaining the limitation and note that the ban is enforced via code review
package.json adds scripts: lint ('biome check .'), lint:fix ('biome check --write .'), format ('biome format --write .')

lefthook.yml defines pre-commit hook with three steps: (1) biome-check: run 'biome check --no-errors-on-unmatched {staged_files}' on staged .ts/.tsx files; (2) env-guard: run a shell command that exits 1 if any staged file matches '.env' or '.env.*' (excluding .env.example); (3) env-example-scan: run a shell command that greps .env.example for patterns matching real token values (length > 20 chars, alphanumeric with dashes/underscores — common API key shape); exit 1 with message 'Possible real credential in .env.example — replace with placeholder' if found
lefthook install runs without errors (can be invoked via bun run prepare script or manually)
Running biome check . on the initial codebase (T-01 scaffold) passes with zero errors
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
